title: plugin manifest

port.description: The port this plugin belongs to.

exec.description: Relative path to the executable (bash / node / python all allowed).

order.description: Execution order (numeric-prefix equivalent). Defaults to the filename's numeric prefix when omitted.

minAutonomy.description: Autonomy filter for sinks etc. Undeclared = safest side (skipped < L3).

timeoutSec.description: Per-plugin execution timeout in seconds. Defaults to the port default.

env.description: Environment variables injected at launch (name → default value / reference).

description: plugin.json manifest (D1 §2). Every plugin declares this in its directory so the core has the metadata needed to launch it across the process boundary.
